Auspicious are the following portents seen in the spring season

392 Brhat Samhitn
constituted by the lunar months of Gaitra and Vaisakha : Thunder-
bolt, lightning, earth-tremor, bright glare at twilight, sounds of loud
thunder, halos, dust, smoke (in forests), the Sun being crimson at
the time of rising and setting, the exudation of food, sweet juices,
oil and an abundant yield of flowers and fruits on trees and increas-
ed sensuality on the part of bulls and birds.
[For details of vide XXX wpra. The commentator
interprets ^ as lightning, and arerflr as : 3T l"]
